text:
Millennium Butterfly 年アゲハ - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Millennium Butterfly 年アゲハ - This card contains a Millennium Butterfly. This legendary insect is named after its unique ability on humans. Anyone who captures one, is blessed with their entire family prospering for generations to come.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.054 :: 年アゲハ 
伝説の昆虫。この蝶を捕まえることが出来た者は、その後、何代にも渡り繁栄することから、この名がついた。
|-
![Eng]
|No.054 :: Millennium Butterfly 
A Legendary Insect. Those who are able to catch the butterfly, the family name with thrive for many generations.
|}
